doc:
PARKED. Static helper for mpfr_gamma (mpfr/src/gamma.c). Returns the minimum precision at which 2 - x is exact for a given x. ADR 0002 criterion (i): no public-API caller in the TS port (mpfr_gamma not yet selected). Standalone port would produce dead code.

Unblock condition: when mpfr_gamma is selected for porting.
